content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible curving leftward, and the car appears to be on course heading westward.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 77, target index = (77+5) % 121 = 82
- WP82: x=1.6926, y=4.4749
- Car: x=1.8570, y=4.4433, heading=-168.33°
- dy = 4.4749 - 4.4433 = +0.0316
- dx = 1.6926 - 1.8570 = -0.1644
- bearing = atan2(0.0316, -0.1644) = 180° - atan(0.0316/0.1644) = 180° - 10.88° = **169.12°**
- delta = 169.12° - (-168.33°) = 337.45° → normalize: 337.45 - 360 = **-22.55°** → right correction needed

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.3810m, distance_from_center = 0.0369m, is_left_of_center=true
- edge_distance (left) = 0.3810 - 0.0369 = **0.3441m** → well clear
- delta = -22.55° → steer right (negative), away from left edge → no boundary concern

Delta ≈ -22.6° → |delta| 15-30°, steer right: steering_angle=-15, speed=1.5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead but WP82 is to the right of current heading (delta≈-22.6°), requiring moderate right steering at full speed to stay on the waypoint line.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with long straight along y≈0.683 before curving left around x=6.3-7.3.",
    "Left curve spans WP27-44 requiring sustained positive steering ~15°.",
    "After left curve, track straightens westward along y≈2.77 (WP44-55).",
    "WP55-70 region: track bends southwest with gentle-to-moderate left curve.",
    "WP70-80 section: track heading ~-168 to -172°, delta can swing ±20° requiring active correction.",
    "WP77-82 section: delta around -22° indicating right correction needed despite visual left curve.",
    "Car consistently 0.007-0.037m left of center in WP70-82 section — no boundary concern.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves; reduce to 1.0 only when delta >30°.",
    "WP80+ region: track continues westward then curves south/southeast back to start.",
    "Track total 121 waypoints, ~17.7m length, car at ~65.1% progress."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.146, 2.046, 1.944, 1.857],
    "y": [4.529, 4.508, 4.475, 4.443],
    "heading": [178.813, -176.629, -171.684, -168.328]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP82 at (1.693, 4.475): bearing≈169.12°, delta≈-22.55° → moderate right correction needed.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -15.0
}
```
